title: General — Endorsement Overview
source_text: TBD - exact manual text required before activation
plain_language_rule: Endorsements are used to add comments, recommendations, or forwarding actions to existing correspondence. An endorsement may be added to the bottom of a basic letter or on a new page depending on space and signing requirements.
notes: Chapter 9 covers endorsement formatting and procedures. This rule provides general overview of when and how endorsements are used. Exact source text extraction pending.
